form.formComment: Suited by inside box. Latest effort finished 2nd on March 6 over 320m at Richmond behind Slick Tease beaten one length (18.36) in a Grade 5. Yet to be beaten in two starts out of this box. Sure to go well.

form.formComment: Hit the frame at this track last time when a 0.8 lengths second but did record a dynamic 17.44 over the 324m journey. Looks an each way chance again here.

form.formComment: Strong performance to win by 1.75 lengths at this track over 324m (17.44) beating Karoline Banner in Grade 5 on April 9. Prepared to overlook.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Strong performance to win by 1.75 lengths at this track over 324m (17.44) beating Karoline Banner in Grade 5 on April 9. Prepared to overlook.

form.formComment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at this track over 324m in 17.38 last start, beating Despicable Rambo. Boasts a course and distance PB in a lightning 17.28. Top chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at this track over 324m in 17.38 last start, beating Despicable Rambo. Boasts a course and distance PB in a lightning 17.28. Top chance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Stumbled shortly after the start and galloped awkwardly.
Approaching the 150m mark raced tightly and came together.

form.formComment: Goes well at this track and trip. At the last start finished 6th on April 12 over 320m at Richmond behind Golden Blend beaten 6 lengths (18.64) in a Grade 5. Must be included.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Passing the turn out of the back straight came together multiple times.

form.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage fourth last time out over 324m at this track. Thereabouts last start but looks tested this time.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage fourth last time out over 300m at Taree Super Track. Can't recommend against this lot.
